stonetop.summary: Tiny winged fae — guardians, workers, or cruel little hooligans.

system.concept: Tiny winged fae — guardians, workers, or cruel little hooligans.
system.description: Tiny little things, winged and fluttering, the size of mice or dragonflies — mishmashes of fur and feather, scales and chitin, gossamer and wings, beautiful or cute or grotesque. Some lived together under the Green Lords; others came together after the war; a surprising number were born into freedom. You might find them keeping watch over a corrupted site or crumbling ruin, or in one of their teeming hidden cities, or — if you're unlucky — roaming the woods bored and cruel and looking for sport.
